phase_name: Live Plane Integration (sidecar handshake + structured pane rendering)

Run-start pane behavior.question: Native run submitted (RunCommandBar, either mode) — pane creation?
Run-start pane behavior.answer: Auto-open + show it: structured pane spawns in Live Work grid immediately; Run Review flips to Live Work focused on new pane

Run-start pane behavior.question: Where in the grid does the new structured pane land?
Run-start pane behavior.answer: Same as sidebar quick-launch agent-spawn path: new cell + balanceRatios equalize — one grid-insertion behavior everywhere

Run-start pane behavior.question: Multiple concurrent native runs?
Run-start pane behavior.answer: One pane per run, no cap — honest 1:1 mapping; grid proven at 9 panes
options_presented: One pane per run, no cap

Attach surface.question: Where does attach-to-existing-session live?
Attach surface.answer: Cockpit sidebar 'Server sessions' section (GET /session list: id/title/age + Attach action); pane lands via quick-launch grid path (carried)

Attach surface.question: Session list scope (store includes CLI voss-chat sessions)?
Attach surface.answer: All listed, recent-first — honest mirror of GET /session, no source filtering

Attach surface.question: Attached session w/o cockpit card — register one?
Attach surface.answer: Yes — attach registers via existing native-card bridge; attached ≡ started, one cockpit model

Transcript density + retention.question: Tool lines default density?
Transcript density + retention.answer: All collapsed one-liners, click to expand (full args/result/excerpt on expand). USER OVERRODE mockup's inline fs_edit excerpts — UI-SPEC must encode collapsed-by-default deviation from mockup

Transcript density + retention.question: Transcript retention for long runs?
Transcript density + retention.answer: Capped, trim oldest (Claude picks N ~ few hundred); EM header + pending permission rows pinned, never trimmed

Transcript density + retention.question: Streaming text display?
Transcript density + retention.answer: stream.delta grows live block w/ existing honest streaming pulse; stream.finalize settles to prose; sticky-bottom auto-scroll unless user scrolled up

Lifecycle affordance placement.question: Cold-start 'starting Voss…' placement?
Lifecycle affordance placement.answer: In-pane boot placeholder ('starting Voss…' + elapsed) until handshake, then transcript begins; statusbar dot secondary

Lifecycle affordance placement.question: Server death mid-run — pane ended-state?
Lifecycle affordance placement.answer: Transcript appends ended banner row + pane chrome dims + statusbar flips snapshot + follow-up disabled-with-reason; reuse ExitBanner visual language

Lifecycle affordance placement.question: Sidecar spawn failure error surface?
Lifecycle affordance placement.answer: Boot placeholder becomes in-pane error state: message + stderr tail + Retry button re-invoking spawn
